text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I've done everything I can to train and stay in
shape.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: But what if that still isn't enough...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I don't need you to tell me that!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Yeah... You're right. I can't be doubting myself!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Okay, I'm going to get out there and run. And I
won't come back a loser!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Okay, I'm going to get out there and run. And I
won't come back a loser!
